title: Absolute Furnace
body:
Absolute Furnace introduces a brand-new way to smelt items using Absolute Energy, a powerful energy source that allows instant or accelerated smelting. Say goodbye to waiting around—just insert your raw materials and watch them cook instantly (or faster than ever).

This mod aims to improve your gameplay with speed, efficiency, and flexibility.

Wiki: [https://jeamcube.com/docs/furnace/](https://jeamcube.com/docs/furnace/)

Created by **JEAMCube**!
